name: sfl-needs-work
description: PR needs fixes (CI, threads, or CR)

name: sfl-done
description: SFL automation done — ready for human merge

name: agent:pause
description: Temporarily pause SFL processing on this item

name: agent:human-required
description: Beyond automation boundary — needs human judgment

name: risk:low
description: Low-risk: formatting, typos, doc updates, dependency bumps, safe refactors

name: risk:high
description: High-risk: auth, payments, data migrations, security, PII

name: report
description: Informational output only — automation must not act on this

name: no-agent
description: Opt this issue out of all Set it Free automation
